newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 gets a major update with reload changes, custom game modes
newsitems.contents:
Possibly one of the most controversial updates for the Counter-Strike series as a whole, the latest Counter-Strike 2 update brings major changes from Valve.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/counter-strike-2-gets-a-major-update-with-reload-changes-custom-game-modes/
newsitems.title_en: Counter-Strike 2 gets a major update with reload changes, custom game modes
newsitems.contents_en:
Possibly one of the most controversial updates for the Counter-Strike series as a whole, the latest Counter-Strike 2 update brings major changes from Valve.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/counter-strike-2-gets-a-major-update-with-reload-changes-custom-game-modes/
newsitems.title_cn: Counter-Strike 2 获得重大更新，包括重新加载更改、自定义游戏模式
newsitems.contents_cn:
最新的《反恐精英 2》更新可能是整个《反恐精英》系列中最具争议的更新之一，它带来了 Valve 的重大更改。

在此处阅读完整文章： https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/counter-strike-2-gets-a-major-update-with-reload-changes-custom-game-modes/

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
[ GAMEPLAY ][list]
[*]Reloading has been refactored to encourage more careful consideration of the use of ammo. When you reload a magazine-fed weapon, all remaining ammo in the magazine is discarded and a new, full magazine is taken from the reserves.
[*]Reserve ammunition is now represented either as number of magazines, shells, or bullets, depending on the weapon.
[*]The fill-level of the current weapon is now displayed below the ammo count. 
[*]Tuned reserve magazine counts per-weapon.[/list]
[ MAP GUIDES ][list]
[*]Limited map guides are now available in Competitive and Retakes (first 5 rounds of the half, 30 node max).
[*]sv_allow_annotations_access_level supports 3 values: 0 – disabled. 1 – limited view. 2 – full and editable. 
[*]sv_annotation_limits_max_rounds_per_half (default 5) determines how many rounds into the half guides are allowed. -1 for unlimited.
[*]Minimal starter map guides have been added for all Active Duty maps.[/list]
[ WORKSHOP MAPS ]
[list]
[*]Friends playing a Practice or Workshop map can be joined through the friends menu if they have Open Party set.[/list]
newsitems.contents_en:
[ GAMEPLAY ][list]
[*]Reloading has been refactored to encourage more careful consideration of the use of ammo. When you reload a magazine-fed weapon, all remaining ammo in the magazine is discarded and a new, full magazine is taken from the reserves.
[*]Reserve ammunition is now represented either as number of magazines, shells, or bullets, depending on the weapon.
[*]The fill-level of the current weapon is now displayed below the ammo count. 
[*]Tuned reserve magazine counts per-weapon.[/list]
[ MAP GUIDES ][list]
[*]Limited map guides are now available in Competitive and Retakes (first 5 rounds of the half, 30 node max).
[*]sv_allow_annotations_access_level supports 3 values: 0 – disabled. 1 – limited view. 2 – full and editable. 
[*]sv_annotation_limits_max_rounds_per_half (default 5) determines how many rounds into the half guides are allowed. -1 for unlimited.
[*]Minimal starter map guides have been added for all Active Duty maps.[/list]
[ WORKSHOP MAPS ]
[list]
[*]Friends playing a Practice or Workshop map can be joined through the friends menu if they have Open Party set.[/list]
newsitems.contents_cn:
[ 游戏玩法 ][ 列表 ]
[*]重装已被重构，以鼓励更仔细地考虑弹药的使用。当您重新装载弹匣供弹的武器时，弹匣中所有剩余的弹药都会被丢弃，并从储备中取出一个新的、装满的弹匣。
[*]储备弹药现在以弹匣、炮弹或子弹的数量表示，具体取决于武器。
[*]当前武器的填充水平现在显示在弹药数下方。 
[*]调整了每种武器的储备弹匣数量。[/list]
[ 地图指南 ][ 列表 ]
[*]现在在竞技赛和重考赛中提供有限的地图指南（半场前 5 轮，最多 30 个节点）。
[*]sv_allow_annotations_access_level 支持 3 个值：0 – 禁用。 1 – 视野有限。 2 – 完整且可编辑。 
[*]sv_annotation_limits_max_rounds_per_half（默认为 5）决定允许多少轮进入半指南。 -1 表示无限制。
[*]已为所有现役地图添加了最小入门地图指南。[/list]
[ 车间地图 ]
[列表]
[*]玩练习或创意工坊地图的朋友如果设置了开放派对，可以通过朋友菜单加入。[/list]

newsitems.title: Guns, Guides, and Games
newsitems.author: Piggles ULTRAPRO
newsitems.contents:
[p]From reloading to custom games, today's update will give you plenty to think about.
[/p][h3]Reload[/h3][p][img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5dd914dd4a8901aa52b0075f683a6d0e3538d55b.png[/img]
When you reload in CS2, the leftover ammo in your magazine is dumped back into an essentially endless reserve supply. And so the decision to reload has never offered significant trade-offs—in a safe position with enough time, you might reload after firing a single bullet, or half a mag, or after firing down to empty, and the rest of the round would be unaffected. 

We think the decision to reload should have higher stakes, so in today's update reloading has been redesigned. Now, when you reload, you'll drop the used magazine and discard all of its remaining ammo. Instead of 'topping off' your weapon with a few bullets, a new full magazine will be taken from the reserves whenever you reload. 

How many reserve mags will each weapon have? Most have gotten a three clips fill-up, but some weapons will have less to reward efficiency and precision, or more to encourage spamming through walls and smokes. Keep an eye on your reserve supply!

[/p][h3]Map Guides in Competitive Matches[/h3][p]
We get it. You [i]could[/i] learn some smokes offline, but who has the time? 

To help you pick up some new tricks, map guides can now be used during the first five rounds of the half in your competitive matches. Competitive map guides are more limited than the ones you use offline, but should be enough to give you a few reminders.

You can activate a guide in the pause menu, and to get you started there are official map guides available for Active Duty maps. But if you're looking for something more specific, you can subscribe to guides on the Steam Community Workshop.

[/p][h3]Join Friends in Custom Games[/h3][p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/12cbcda636bfce8e15f9df254d0725feb0261abe.png[/img]
Over the past several months, the CS community has been hard at work building custom game modes using special scripting tools. Now, you can join your friends in the fun!

Whenever you're playing a custom game, whether on a community server or hosted locally, your friends will be able to join you directly from the Friends list (as long as the server allows it). 

Want to set up your own custom game? Head over to your Workshop Maps tab in the Play menu, and make sure to turn on "Open Party." Now, when you start playing your workshop map you'll host a game on your machine, and your friends will be able to join.

So head to the Steam Community Workshop, subscribe to some maps, and try something new![/p]
newsitems.contents_en:
[p]From reloading to custom games, today's update will give you plenty to think about.
[/p][h3]Reload[/h3][p][img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5dd914dd4a8901aa52b0075f683a6d0e3538d55b.png[/img]
When you reload in CS2, the leftover ammo in your magazine is dumped back into an essentially endless reserve supply. And so the decision to reload has never offered significant trade-offs—in a safe position with enough time, you might reload after firing a single bullet, or half a mag, or after firing down to empty, and the rest of the round would be unaffected. 

We think the decision to reload should have higher stakes, so in today's update reloading has been redesigned. Now, when you reload, you'll drop the used magazine and discard all of its remaining ammo. Instead of 'topping off' your weapon with a few bullets, a new full magazine will be taken from the reserves whenever you reload. 

How many reserve mags will each weapon have? Most have gotten a three clips fill-up, but some weapons will have less to reward efficiency and precision, or more to encourage spamming through walls and smokes. Keep an eye on your reserve supply!

[/p][h3]Map Guides in Competitive Matches[/h3][p]
We get it. You [i]could[/i] learn some smokes offline, but who has the time? 

To help you pick up some new tricks, map guides can now be used during the first five rounds of the half in your competitive matches. Competitive map guides are more limited than the ones you use offline, but should be enough to give you a few reminders.

You can activate a guide in the pause menu, and to get you started there are official map guides available for Active Duty maps. But if you're looking for something more specific, you can subscribe to guides on the Steam Community Workshop.

[/p][h3]Join Friends in Custom Games[/h3][p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/12cbcda636bfce8e15f9df254d0725feb0261abe.png[/img]
Over the past several months, the CS community has been hard at work building custom game modes using special scripting tools. Now, you can join your friends in the fun!

Whenever you're playing a custom game, whether on a community server or hosted locally, your friends will be able to join you directly from the Friends list (as long as the server allows it). 

Want to set up your own custom game? Head over to your Workshop Maps tab in the Play menu, and make sure to turn on "Open Party." Now, when you start playing your workshop map you'll host a game on your machine, and your friends will be able to join.

So head to the Steam Community Workshop, subscribe to some maps, and try something new![/p]
newsitems.contents_cn:
[p]从重新加载到自定义游戏，今天的更新将给你带来很多思考。
[/p][h3]重新加载[/h3][p][img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5dd914dd4a8901aa52b0075f683a6d0e3538d55b.png[/img]
当你在 CS2 中重新装弹时，弹匣中剩余的弹药会被转回本质上无穷无尽的储备供应中。因此，重新装弹的决定从来没有带来重大的权衡——在一个安全的位置，有足够的时间，你可能会在发射一颗子弹或半弹匣后重新装弹，或者在射击到空后重新装弹，而该轮的其余部分将不受影响。 

我们认为重新加载的决定应该具有更高的风险，因此在今天的更新中重新设计了重新加载。现在，当您重新装弹时，您将丢弃用过的弹匣并丢弃所有剩余的弹药。每当您重新装弹时，都会从储备中取出一个新的完整弹匣，而不是用几颗子弹“补充”您的武器。 

每件武器有多少备用弹匣？大多数武器都配备了三个弹夹，但有些武器的弹夹填充量较少，以奖励效率和精确度，或者更多，以鼓励穿过墙壁和烟雾进行垃圾邮件。请留意您的储备供应！

[/p][h3]竞技比赛中的地图指南[/h3][p]
我们明白了。你[i]可以[/i]离线学习一些抽烟的知识，但是谁有时间呢？ 

为了帮助您掌握一些新技巧，现在可以在竞技比赛的前五轮比赛中使用地图指南。竞争性地图指南比您离线使用的地图指南更有限，但应该足以给您一些提醒。

您可以在暂停菜单中激活指南，为了帮助您入门，有适用于现役地图的官方地图指南。但如果您正在寻找更具体的内容，您可以订阅 Steam 社区研讨会上的指南。

[/p][h3]在自定义游戏中加入好友[/h3][p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/12cbcda636bfce8e15f9df254d0725feb0261abe.png[/img]
在过去的几个月里，CS 社区一直在努力使用特殊的脚本工具构建自定义游戏模式。现在，你可以和你的朋友一起享受乐趣了！

每当您玩自定义游戏时，无论是在社区服务器上还是在本地托管，您的朋友都可以直接从好友列表中加入您（只要服务器允许）。 

想要设置您自己的自定义游戏吗？前往“播放”菜单中的“创意工坊地图”选项卡，并确保打开“开放派对”。现在，当您开始玩工坊地图时，您将在您的计算机上托管游戏，并且您的朋友将能够加入。

因此，前往 Steam 社区创意工坊，订阅一些地图，并尝试新的东西！[/p]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Gautam
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ X-Ray Scanner ][/p][list][*][p]Players in Germany and Netherlands will have an [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/7336-6EBC-1923-EE1B"]X-Ray Scanner[/url] tab in their Inventory. For those players, containers can only be opened via X-ray Scanner. The X-Ray Scanner will come preloaded with a one-time exclusive non-tradable "Genuine P250 | X-ray", which must be claimed before using the X-Ray Scanner to reveal items in other containers.[/p][/*][*][p]Keyless Containers, like Souvenir Packages, can be opened without the X-Ray Scanner.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ X-Ray Scanner ][/p][list][*][p]Players in Germany and Netherlands will have an [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/7336-6EBC-1923-EE1B"]X-Ray Scanner[/url] tab in their Inventory. For those players, containers can only be opened via X-ray Scanner. The X-Ray Scanner will come preloaded with a one-time exclusive non-tradable "Genuine P250 | X-ray", which must be claimed before using the X-Ray Scanner to reveal items in other containers.[/p][/*][*][p]Keyless Containers, like Souvenir Packages, can be opened without the X-Ray Scanner.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ X 射线扫描仪][/p][列表][*][p]德国和荷兰的玩家的物品栏中将有一个 [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/7336-6EBC-1923-EE1B"]X 射线扫描仪[/url] 选项卡。对于这些玩家来说，容器只能通过 X 射线扫描仪打开。 X 射线扫描仪将预装一次性独有的不可交易的“正品 P250 | X 射线”，必须在使用 X 射线扫描仪显示其他容器中的物品之前领取它。[/p][/*][*][p]无钥匙容器，例如纪念品包，无需 X 射线扫描仪即可打开。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ DEAD HAND COLLECTION ][/p][list][*][p]The Dead Hand Collection is now available, featuring 17 finishes from community contributors, and including 22 all-new gloves as rare special items.[/p][/*][*][p]Access items in the Dead Hand Collection via the Dead Hand Terminal, available as a weekly drop.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a pixel gap in a door Outside Long. [/p][/*][/list][p]Alpine[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3221491619"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ DEAD HAND COLLECTION ][/p][list][*][p]The Dead Hand Collection is now available, featuring 17 finishes from community contributors, and including 22 all-new gloves as rare special items.[/p][/*][*][p]Access items in the Dead Hand Collection via the Dead Hand Terminal, available as a weekly drop.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a pixel gap in a door Outside Long. [/p][/*][/list][p]Alpine[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3221491619"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ DEAD HAND COLLECTION ][/p][list][*][p]Dead Hand Collection 现已推出，其中包括来自社区贡献者的 17 件作品，其中包括 22 副全新手套作为稀有特殊物品。[/p][/*][*][p]通过 Dead Hand 终端访问 Dead Hand Collection 中的物品，每周掉落一次。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[地图][/p][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]修复了长门外的像素间隙。 [/p][/*][/list][p]Alpine[/p][list][*][p]已更新至社区研讨会的最新版本 ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3221491619"]更新说明[/url])[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: The Dead Hand
newsitems.author: Gautam
newsitems.contents:
Today we're introducing the Dead Hand Collection, featuring 17 finishes from community contributors and 22 all-new gloves as rare special items. 

[carousel][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/55ed2cb8da5c61796d087c29b39e0b4bd8220443.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/4d57e0881ea5a03a6dcc0ac66a84ea6d53f219a9.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/35c54315ef06d422a43b8496164d4312a8e1e9bb.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5f6d660c715c292dcb61866db01e789e601bce66.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3040e04dc40837b8a83a521e2c8a458566e624e1.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/a35829d7ca4d55e845ac2553ccf79d4f772968c0.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/445e79f8c96471558c870cd5fef7dd5832949352.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/645d240c446786214f9bbd82b8ef1eb08e8c7810.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/ce89d9a097570a6585b59591177e35b70fdac56c.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/b1c7fbe650d6bd446d5e837f02ef8edd927e6f50.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3dbb9fd18ce41a2e99e9f8f59ee388e11c277816.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6d77e38ffad92ef4c679b070dfa2520a7c3830f4.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1812765f31311143ec1d1814dc9834cf75a4f9bf.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/e7d6b59bdb4a89299c8efa738966c5ec8d39f7ab.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6188ca23461f22e4683a4bfd20dc456b781bfc28.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8003f65e646074d467a00bc4f9ce46c4cd33cd3c.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2982d49353ccd4e63da81bd543876a0bd17dd62a.png[/img][/carousel]

[h3]Mutually Assured Distraction[/h3]
The Dead Hand collection features 22 all-new gloves guaranteed to add style to your highlight reel.

[carousel][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/214fb25064fffbcf39b02a60f2f7f7a3f55ccc10.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fcf7fb5f2e360aafb6472b6b9548a3a80b3fab58.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/9b488102a51e8edc7f0a9b4b20d4e1c2ac3a95de.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/d75a620125d6e94b1806e164be8a63f48665dd1d.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/32e4e5e21262ec489f24bb5e500314bdef00ec2f.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/099a71246cc4770db4cbe5861b960f71587dcba5.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/158498c8c37ba0d7e47d3caeedddf698448bcc19.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/7561196054507481cd4776f61cc889953b183a30.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/cb8fd526f8d2a8ef32b5aef4a591fd3b2aabade9.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8309c0cbbd43405d03217ce391814b09f4f2af97.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/59710d4f950353685468e4dadc322f5f19357b0d.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3e2566266c3dc14afb3179af8d3f285131d94dd5.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5f08d71bc37a578f3adf7698ed8e55190f25dccf.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/0280e1db9d18cf89a689a0ec953c5908b30e6872.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2d363d6c2bf11215ec9c8cdbda341fadc0a96d55.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6059229d5d271ce038b355b9ebba4d72ebda8d08.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5ed63c4b8950f068643a1f43cc034f7fed64ec36.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c5573d9d36b5c88924f8f383086dd7bfbb1df441.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1c76b6778077a158b81050bdf7f2324dfa244762.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/ff142a24005e9f1264bda5275b94debe5889e2c7.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/350805b84f74b3891841115ec4bcdbdff6e4d6f6.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6df304b514129f86586d106e025eed2b4c2dd8d8.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/efc53924ba4c57105b0760f32c45c87b0b603055.png[/img][/carousel]

Dying to get your hands in these mitts? You can purchase Dead Hand Collection items from Dead Hand Terminals, which are available now as a possible weekly drop.
newsitems.contents_en:
Today we're introducing the Dead Hand Collection, featuring 17 finishes from community contributors and 22 all-new gloves as rare special items. 

[carousel][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/55ed2cb8da5c61796d087c29b39e0b4bd8220443.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/4d57e0881ea5a03a6dcc0ac66a84ea6d53f219a9.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/35c54315ef06d422a43b8496164d4312a8e1e9bb.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5f6d660c715c292dcb61866db01e789e601bce66.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3040e04dc40837b8a83a521e2c8a458566e624e1.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/a35829d7ca4d55e845ac2553ccf79d4f772968c0.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/445e79f8c96471558c870cd5fef7dd5832949352.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/645d240c446786214f9bbd82b8ef1eb08e8c7810.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/ce89d9a097570a6585b59591177e35b70fdac56c.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/b1c7fbe650d6bd446d5e837f02ef8edd927e6f50.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3dbb9fd18ce41a2e99e9f8f59ee388e11c277816.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6d77e38ffad92ef4c679b070dfa2520a7c3830f4.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1812765f31311143ec1d1814dc9834cf75a4f9bf.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/e7d6b59bdb4a89299c8efa738966c5ec8d39f7ab.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6188ca23461f22e4683a4bfd20dc456b781bfc28.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8003f65e646074d467a00bc4f9ce46c4cd33cd3c.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2982d49353ccd4e63da81bd543876a0bd17dd62a.png[/img][/carousel]

[h3]Mutually Assured Distraction[/h3]
The Dead Hand collection features 22 all-new gloves guaranteed to add style to your highlight reel.

[carousel][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/214fb25064fffbcf39b02a60f2f7f7a3f55ccc10.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fcf7fb5f2e360aafb6472b6b9548a3a80b3fab58.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/9b488102a51e8edc7f0a9b4b20d4e1c2ac3a95de.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/d75a620125d6e94b1806e164be8a63f48665dd1d.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/32e4e5e21262ec489f24bb5e500314bdef00ec2f.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/099a71246cc4770db4cbe5861b960f71587dcba5.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/158498c8c37ba0d7e47d3caeedddf698448bcc19.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/7561196054507481cd4776f61cc889953b183a30.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/cb8fd526f8d2a8ef32b5aef4a591fd3b2aabade9.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8309c0cbbd43405d03217ce391814b09f4f2af97.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/59710d4f950353685468e4dadc322f5f19357b0d.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3e2566266c3dc14afb3179af8d3f285131d94dd5.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5f08d71bc37a578f3adf7698ed8e55190f25dccf.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/0280e1db9d18cf89a689a0ec953c5908b30e6872.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2d363d6c2bf11215ec9c8cdbda341fadc0a96d55.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6059229d5d271ce038b355b9ebba4d72ebda8d08.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5ed63c4b8950f068643a1f43cc034f7fed64ec36.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c5573d9d36b5c88924f8f383086dd7bfbb1df441.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1c76b6778077a158b81050bdf7f2324dfa244762.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/ff142a24005e9f1264bda5275b94debe5889e2c7.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/350805b84f74b3891841115ec4bcdbdff6e4d6f6.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6df304b514129f86586d106e025eed2b4c2dd8d8.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/efc53924ba4c57105b0760f32c45c87b0b603055.png[/img][/carousel]

Dying to get your hands in these mitts? You can purchase Dead Hand Collection items from Dead Hand Terminals, which are available now as a possible weekly drop.
newsitems.contents_cn:
今天，我们将推出 Dead Hand 系列，其中包括来自社区贡献者的 17 种饰面和 22 种全新手套，作为稀有特殊物品。 

[轮播][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/55ed2cb8da5c61796d087c29b39e0b4bd8220443.png[/i mg][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/4d57e0881ea5a03a6dcc0ac66a84ea6d53f219a9.png[/img][img] https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/35c54315ef06d422a43b8496164d4312a8e1e9bb.png[/img][img]https:// clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5f6d660c715c292dcb61866db01e789e601bce66.png[/img][img]https://clan.fas tly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3040e04dc40837b8a83a521e2c8a458566e624e1.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.stea mstatic.com/images/3381077/a35829d7ca4d55e845ac2553ccf79d4f772968c0.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic。 com/images/3381077/445e79f8c96471558c870cd5fef7dd5832949352.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/imag es/3381077/645d240c446786214f9bbd82b8ef1eb08e8c7810.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/33810 77/ce89d9a097570a6585b59591177e35b70fdac56c.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/b1c7f be650d6bd446d5e837f02ef8edd927e6f50.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3dbb9fd18ce41 a2e99e9f8f59ee388e11c277816.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6d77e38ffad92ef4c679b 070dfa2520a7c3830f4.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1812765f31311143ec1d1814dc983 4cf75a4f9bf.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/e7d6b59bdb4a89299c8efa738966c5ec8d39f 7ab.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6188ca23461f22e4683a4bfd20dc456b781bfc28.png[ /img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8003f65e646074d467a00bc4f9ce46c4cd33cd3c.png[/img][im g]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2982d49353ccd4e63da81bd543876a0bd17dd62a.png[/img][/carousel]

[h3]相互确保分散注意力[/h3]
Dead Hand 系列包含 22 款全新手套，保证为您的精彩片段增添风格。

[轮播][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/214fb25064fffbcf39b02a60f2f7f7a3f55ccc10.png[/img][i mg]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fcf7fb5f2e360aafb6472b6b9548a3a80b3fab58.png[/img][img]https://c lan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/9b488102a51e8edc7f0a9b4b20d4e1c2ac3a95de.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.s teamstatic.com/images/3381077/d75a620125d6e94b1806e164be8a63f48665dd1d.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.c om/images/3381077/32e4e5e21262ec489f24bb5e500314bdef00ec2f.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/33 81077/099a71246cc4770db4cbe5861b960f71587dcba5.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/158498 c8c37ba0d7e47d3caeedddf698448bcc19.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/7561196054507481cd 4776f61cc889953b183a30.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/cb8fd526f8d2a8ef32b5aef4a591fd 3b2aabade9.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8309c0cbbd43405d03217ce391814b09f4f2af97.p ng[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/59710d4f950353685468e4dadc322f5f19357b0d.png[/img][img ]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3e2566266c3dc14afb3179af8d3f285131d94dd5.png[/img][img]https://cla n.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5f08d71bc37a578f3adf7698ed8e55190f25dccf.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.ste amstatic.com/images/3381077/0280e1db9d18cf89a689a0ec953c5908b30e6872.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com /images/3381077/2d363d6c2bf11215ec9c8cdbda341fadc0a96d55.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381 077/6059229d5d271ce038b355b9ebba4d72ebda8d08.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5ed63c4b 8950f068643a1f43cc034f7fed64ec36.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c5573d9d36b5c88924f8f

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Vitaliy
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Starting today, items listed for sale on Steam Community Market will remain in your inventory for use while they are listed (e.g., your weapon can be equipped in your loadout while it is listed). While listed, items cannot be consumed or modified. You can cancel your listings at any time.[/p][/*][*][p]Added ability to set your max offer limit for items in the Terminal, and the Arms Dealer will only show offers up to that limit.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a slight tilt in the chicken running animation.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Inferno[/p][list][*][p]Balcony at Bombsite A has been extended.[/p][/*][*][p]Graveyard at Bombsite A has been closed to the public. [/p][/*][*][p]Clipping adjusted at small window next to Second Mid Balcony.[/p][/*][/list][p]Warden[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3256988376"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Sanctum[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3643331442"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added hitEntity to OnBulletImpact event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added Entity.GetAbsAngularVelocity()[/p][/*][*][p]Added Entity.GetLocalAngularVelocity()[/p][/*][*][p]Added angularVelocity to Entity.Teleport()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.SetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.SetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponData.GetMaxClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponData.GetMaxReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing CSPlayerPawn.IsDucking()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing CSPlayerPawn.IsDucked()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where JUMP wouldn't trigger for WasInputJustPressed() and WasInputJustReleased() if the press didn't cross a tick boundary.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where Entity methods GetEyePosition(), GetEyeAngles(), GetHealth(), GetMaxHealth(), and SetMaxHealth() would only work on CSPlayerPawns.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Starting today, items listed for sale on Steam Community Market will remain in your inventory for use while they are listed (e.g., your weapon can be equipped in your loadout while it is listed). While listed, items cannot be consumed or modified. You can cancel your listings at any time.[/p][/*][*][p]Added ability to set your max offer limit for items in the Terminal, and the Arms Dealer will only show offers up to that limit.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a slight tilt in the chicken running animation.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Inferno[/p][list][*][p]Balcony at Bombsite A has been extended.[/p][/*][*][p]Graveyard at Bombsite A has been closed to the public. [/p][/*][*][p]Clipping adjusted at small window next to Second Mid Balcony.[/p][/*][/list][p]Warden[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3256988376"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Sanctum[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3643331442"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added hitEntity to OnBulletImpact event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added Entity.GetAbsAngularVelocity()[/p][/*][*][p]Added Entity.GetLocalAngularVelocity()[/p][/*][*][p]Added angularVelocity to Entity.Teleport()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.SetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.SetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponData.GetMaxClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponData.GetMaxReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing CSPlayerPawn.IsDucking()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing CSPlayerPawn.IsDucked()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where JUMP wouldn't trigger for WasInputJustPressed() and WasInputJustReleased() if the press didn't cross a tick boundary.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where Entity methods GetEyePosition(), GetEyeAngles(), GetHealth(), GetMaxHealth(), and SetMaxHealth() would only work on CSPlayerPawns.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]从今天开始，Steam 社区市场上列出的待售物品将保留在您的库存中，以便在列出时使用（例如，您的武器可以在列出时装备在您的装备中）。列出后，物品不能被消耗或修改。您可以随时取消您的列表。[/p][/*][*][p]增加了为终端中的物品设置最大报价限制的功能，军火商只会显示达到该限制的报价。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了小鸡奔跑动画中的轻微倾斜。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ 地图][/p][p]Inferno[/p][list][*][p]炸弹点 A 的阳台已扩建。[/p][/*][*][p]炸弹点 A 的墓地已不对公众开放。 [/p][/*][*][p]在第二个中阳台旁边的小窗口调整剪辑。[/p][/*][/list][p]典狱长[/p][list][*][p]更新到社区研讨会的最新版本（[url =“https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3256988376”]更新注释[/url]）[/p][/*][/list][p]Sanctum[/p][list][*][p]已更新至社区研讨会的最新版本（[url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3643331442"]更新注释[/url]）[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[地图脚本][/p][list][*][p]向 OnBulletImpact 事件数据添加了 hitEntity[/p][/*][*][p]向Entity.Teleport()[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSWeaponBase.GetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSWeaponBase.SetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSWeaponBase.GetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]添加了CSWeaponBase.SetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSWeaponData.GetMaxClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSWeaponData.GetMaxReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]修复了缺失CSPlayerPawn.IsDucking()[/p][/*][*][p]修复了缺失的 CSPlayerPawn.IsDucked()[/p][/*][*][p]修复了如果按下未跨越刻度线边界则 WasInputJustPressed() 和 WasInputJustReleased() 不会触发 JUMP 的错误。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了以下错误实体方法 GetEyePosition()、GetEyeAngles()、GetHealth()、GetMaxHealth() 和 SetMaxHealth() 仅适用于 CSPlayerPawns。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: CSGO is back on Steam, if you know where to look
newsitems.author: editor@pcgamesn.com
newsitems.contents:
Counter-Strike 2 has largely been a continued triumph for Valve, sitting atop the Steam charts and consistently pulling daily player-count peaks that nearly double the second-placed Dota 2. Yet some of us crave the way things used to be. If that's you, the good news is that predecessor Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, most affectionately known as CS:GO, is now back on Steam, boasting its own unique page, although you'll need to look closely to find it.

Read the rest of the story...

RELATED LINKS:
Ambitious Counter-Strike mod suspends launch after alleged Valve response
Valve allegedly blocks Counter-Strike mod eight years in the making from Steam
CSGO ranks 2024 - CS:GO MM ranking explained

Counter-Strike 2 has largely been a continued triumph for Valve, sitting atop the Steam charts and consistently pulling daily player-count peaks that nearly double the second-placed Dota 2. Yet some of us crave the way things used to be. If that's you, the good news is that predecessor Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, most affectionately known as CS:GO, is now back on Steam, boasting its own unique page, although you'll need to look closely to find it.

newsitems.title_cn: CSGO 重返 Steam，如果你知道去哪里找
newsitems.contents_cn:
反恐精英 2 在很大程度上是 Valve 的持续胜利，在 Steam 排行榜上名列前茅，并且每天都在持续拉动玩家人数达到顶峰，几乎是第二名 Dota 2 的两倍。然而，我们中的一些人却渴望回到过去的样子。如果您就是这样，那么好消息是前作《反恐精英：全球攻势》（最被人们亲切地称为《CS:GO》）现在又回到了 Steam，并拥有自己独特的页面，不过您需要仔细观察才能找到它。

阅读故事的其余部分...

相关链接：
雄心勃勃的《反恐精英》模组在据称 Valve 回应后暂停发布
Valve 涉嫌阻止 Steam 制作《反恐精英》模组八年
2024 年 CSGO 排名 - CS:GO MM 排名说明

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.SetSaveData[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetSaveData[/p][list][*][p]Workshop maps can write up to 1MB of save data.[/p][/*][*][p]Workshop saves leverage Steam Cloud and persist across installs.[/p][/*][*][p]Save data size limit can be configured with sv_workshop_map_save_data_max_filesize_mb.[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnModifyPlayerDamage[/p][list][*][p]Called after all damage properties have been calculated, just before armor and health are modified[/p][/*][*][p]Replaces Instance.OnBeforePlayerDamage[/p][/*][*][p]Includes hitgroup in event data[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added hitgroup to OnPlayerDamage event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSDamageFlags.IGNORE_ARMOR[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsInputPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustReleased[/p][/*][*][p]Added enum CSInputs[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug where CSDamageTypes was exported under the name CSDamageType[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Map guides for de_ancient can now be used on de_ancient_night and vice versa.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.SetSaveData[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetSaveData[/p][list][*][p]Workshop maps can write up to 1MB of save data.[/p][/*][*][p]Workshop saves leverage Steam Cloud and persist across installs.[/p][/*][*][p]Save data size limit can be configured with sv_workshop_map_save_data_max_filesize_mb.[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnModifyPlayerDamage[/p][list][*][p]Called after all damage properties have been calculated, just before armor and health are modified[/p][/*][*][p]Replaces Instance.OnBeforePlayerDamage[/p][/*][*][p]Includes hitgroup in event data[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added hitgroup to OnPlayerDamage event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSDamageFlags.IGNORE_ARMOR[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsInputPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustReleased[/p][/*][*][p]Added enum CSInputs[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug where CSDamageTypes was exported under the name CSDamageType[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Map guides for de_ancient can now be used on de_ancient_night and vice versa.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 地图脚本 ][/p][list][*][p]添加了 Instance.SetSaveData[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 Instance.GetSaveData[/p][list][*][p]创意工坊地图最多可以写入 1MB 的保存数据。[/p][/*][*][p]创意工坊保存利用 Steam Cloud 并持久保存安装。[/p][/*][*][p]可以使用 sv_workshop_map_save_data_max_filesize_mb 配置保存数据大小限制。[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]添加 Instance.OnModifyPlayerDamage[/p][list][*][p]在计算所有伤害属性后、在护甲和生命值计算之前调用已修改[/p][/*][*][p]替换Instance.OnBeforePlayerDamage[/p][/*][*][p]在事件数据中包含hitgroup[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]将hitgroup添加到OnPlayerDamage事件数据中[/p][/*][*][p]已添加CSDamageFlags.IGNORE_ARMOR[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerPawn.IsInputPressed[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustPressed[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustReleased[/p][/*][*][p]添加了枚举CSInputs[/p][/*][*][p]修复了以 CSDamageType 名称导出 CSDamageTypes 的错误[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]de_ancient 的地图指南现在可以在 de_ancient_night 上使用，反之亦然。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Mitigated a performance issue that primarily affected Windows 10 users with recent Intel CPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where the Delete Item inventory option wasn't working.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of visual corruption using iron sights on AMD GPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Expanding list of console variables addons are allowed to change.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Overpass[/p][list][*][p]Fixed the Party balloons.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Mitigated a performance issue that primarily affected Windows 10 users with recent Intel CPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where the Delete Item inventory option wasn't working.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of visual corruption using iron sights on AMD GPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Expanding list of console variables addons are allowed to change.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Overpass[/p][list][*][p]Fixed the Party balloons.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]缓解了主要影响使用最新 Intel CPU 的 Windows 10 用户的性能问题。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了“删除项目”库存选项不起作用的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了在 AMD 上使用机械瞄准器时出现视觉损坏的情况GPU。[/p][/*][*][p]允许更改控制台变量插件的扩展列表。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]立交桥[/p][list][*][p]修复了派对气球。[/p][/*][/list]
